name: Yorkshire Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and salt together in a bowl.
2. Slowly stir in the milk, and beat until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each egg until the batter is creamy.
4. Cover with a towel and chill for at least two hours.
5. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C).
6. Heat 8 tablespoons of dripping in a shallow pan in the oven until sizzling.
7. Beat the batter vigorously a few times, then pour it into the hot pan so that it is about half an inch deep.
8. Bake for 15 minutes at 450°F (230°C), then reduce to 350°F (180°C).
9. Continue baking for 10 to 15 minutes or until light and brown.
10. Cut into squares.
